description: Summarize migration readiness (high/medium/low), manual-review item count, existing-Codex collisions, and orphaned artifacts (--doctor, read-only).
rules: inspects only; never writes target files
computes a readiness grade from manual-review, collision, and orphan counts
usage: Set SOURCE (Claude source root) and TARGET (Codex root). Output: doctor.txt.
limitation: Read-only readiness report; writes nothing. The vendored CLI imports tomllib and needs Python 3.11+ to run; on older Python it degrades to an empty report.
